title: Reuse a key and it vanishes: cipher1 XOR cipher2 = plain1 XOR plain2
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — the two-time pad leak ---
def __plot():
    p1 = "attack base"
    p2 = "defend zone"
    key = [42, 200, 13, 99, 7, 250, 1, 128, 64, 33, 170]
    c1 = [ord(c) ^ k for c, k in zip(p1, key)]
    c2 = [ord(c) ^ k for c, k in zip(p2, key)]
    leak = [a ^ b for a, b in zip(c1, c2)]
    direct = [ord(a) ^ ord(b) for a, b in zip(p1, p2)]
    return [
        {"name": "cipher1 XOR cipher2 (the leak)", "points": [[i, leak[i]] for i in range(len(leak))], "highlight": True},
        {"name": "plain1 XOR plain2 (key gone!)", "points": [[i, direct[i]] for i in range(len(direct))], "highlight": False},
    ]
